reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar espacio y atención. Hay agua caliente y bancos con mesas bajo los árboles agradable para detenerse a almorzar o tomar unos mates. Baños limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Lovely place, spacious and attentive. There's hot water and benches with tables under the trees, a nice spot to stop for lunch or some mate. Clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
En limpieza es un 9, permanentemente encontramos gente de aseo al pendiente. El sector de mesas tiene buena sombra para hacer pic nic. El Full es dinámico, pero los precios son como en toda estación de servicio. Al sector juegos le falta sombra.

(Translated by Google)
Cleanliness is a 9 out of 10; there are always cleaning staff on hand. The picnic area has good shade. The Full is busy, but prices are like any other gas station. The play area needs more shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa3NpenRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
CUIDADOO! Hace 1 semana paré para comer una hamburguesa azteca para llevar. no tenian nada mas que pan y carne.. La llevé igual pero reclamé. Compré un pote de helado Fra Nui y cuando lo destapo ya estaba abierto y faltaba la mitad de las frambuesas... Calcularon que me daria cuenta lejos... Un desastre. Me lo cambiaron.. Vayan a otro lugar. La papas horribles.. el aceite era viejisimo con muy feo olor.. No me pasó en ninguna otra YPF. Cuidado!

(Translated by Google)
BEWARE! A week ago I stopped to get an Aztec burger to go. They had nothing but bread and meat. I took it anyway, but I complained. I bought a tub of Fra Nui ice cream, and when I opened it, it was already open and half the raspberries were missing. They figured I'd notice from a distance. A disaster. They replaced it. Go somewhere else. The fries were awful. The oil was ancient and smelled terrible. I've never had this happen at any other YPF station. Beware!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNHF5a3VnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar que es muy grande porque está al lado de un parque que pertenece a Dolores y tiene muchas mesitas y árboles para sentarte y almorzar, merendar o descansar un rato del viaje (en mi caso de Mar del Plata a Buenos Aires). Los baños están dentro del todo limpios y por supuesto está la estación de servicio donde cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
It's a very large place because it's next to a park belonging to Dolores, and it has plenty of tables and trees where you can sit and have lunch, a snack, or rest for a while after your trip (in my case, from Mar del Plata to Buenos Aires). The restrooms inside are spotless, and of course, there's a gas station where you can fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXM1AtUWZnEAE
